## Lite

- Sample `samples/minimal-demo/` no longer bundles a full Lite copy; copy `addons/savestate` from the repo or from this Lite zip before opening the project
- `samples/minimal-demo/addons/README.txt` explains the one-time copy step
- README and QUICKSTART: Lite zip comes from GitHub Releases only

## Pro

- **Paid addon — not in this repo:** [SaveState Pro on itch.io](https://chuumberry.itch.io/savestate-pro)
- Repack itch zip with Lite **1.1.2** + Pro; include README + QUICKSTART only (changelog stays on GitHub, not inside the project zip)
